arts.ttl: Chelsea may have moved ahead of Liverpool in race for £42m transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea may reportedly be ahead of Liverpool now in the race for the transfer of one of Europe’s top central defenders outside of the traditional big five leagues. The Blues are being linked strongly with Feyenoord centre-back David Hancko, who has also been a Liverpool target, as CaughtOffside recently revealed. arts.ttl: Liverpool fans' legal claims against UEFA over the 2022 Champions League final, where supporters were tear-gassed by French police, can be heard in England
arts.sum: A High Court judge has ruled that the legal claims of more than 800 Liverpool supporters against UEFA over the chaos of the 2022 Champions League final can be heard in England.

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard picture has fans convinced Liverpool legend is close to managerial return
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard has been heavily linked with a return to Rangers and some more sleuth-like supporters think he has dropped a telling hint

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister admits what 'everyone' in Liverpool dressing room is saying about title win
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister has said Liverpool's squad are being driven on by the prospect of finally being able to celebrate a Premier League title win

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp's reason for quitting Liverpool becomes perfectly clear with look at new life
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp's decision to leave Liverpool shocked the football world, but a glimpse into his life after Anfield justifies his decision

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Southampton – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It’s top against bottom in the Premier League this afternoon as Liverpool welcome Southampton to Anfield. The league leaders earned a precious result in the Champions League during midweek as they beat Paris Saint-Germain 1-0 in the French capital. arts.ttl: When Arne Slot's touchline ban ends after Liverpool red card suspension
arts.sum: Liverpool host Southampton at Anfield on Saturday afternoon with Arne Slot serving the final match of his touchline suspension dished out after the game against Everton

arts.ttl: PSG players 'shocked by how POOR Liverpool were' despite 1-0 loss - with French champions 'convinced two other Champions League clubs are more complete than Arne Slot's side'
arts.sum: PSG players were reportedly left shocked by the poor level of Liverpool 's performance in the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on Wednesday night.
